reasons_map.age_out_of_range: Applicant age is outside the accepted lending range.
reasons_map.low_income: Monthly income is below the minimum baseline.
reasons_map.low_credit: Credit score is below the acceptable lending threshold.
reasons_map.high_liabilities: Existing liabilities are high relative to income.
reasons_map.unsupported_employment: Employment profile is not preferred for this policy.
reasons_map.requested_amount_high: Requested loan amount is high compared to income.
reasons_map.positive_profile: Income, credit score, and liabilities are within preferred limits.
